Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: Someone has been setting fires all over the city to empty warehouse, and Hunter and McCall are on the case.
Video.title: Fire Man

Video.summary: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.
Video.title: Case X

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes that remind him of his wife who jilted him.
Video.title: Sniper

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: The five-year old disappearance of B-movie starlet sends Reno south of the border, following a hot tip from one of Bobby's informants.
Video.title: The Hot Tip

Video.summary: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.
Video.title: Moody River

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 1

Video.summary: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 2

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: Rita and Chris defend Rita’s friend accused of killing her nanny amid her husband’s secret affair.
Video.title: The Sock Drawer

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts

Video.summary: Reno takes refuge in a commune but discovers an explosive situation there.
Video.title: Paradise Lost

Video.summary: Bobby's mother and cousin visit and set off a series of unwelcome, dangerous surprises.
Video.title: Love Hurts

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby investigate a government cover-up concerning possible remains of alien beings.
Video.title: Hard Evidence

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The death of another female cop has a deep psychological effect on Rita.
Video.title: Jasmine

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
